content.en:
"Disciple, your world contains a huge opportunity, not only for us, but also for you. If there are no domain realm relics, the limit of your ultimate achievement is estimated to be Dao Ancestor, after all, there is no inheritance on top of Dao Ancestor in our area. And the domain realm ruins have obtained the inheritance above the Dao Ancestor, once you get such an inheritance, there is hope to surpass the Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said in a deep voice.

"Master, disciple understands!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Okay, the master is leaving, because of the matter of the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect, the Dao Ancestors in the chaos are already preparing for the things that will come in the future, and the Void Heaven Vein also needs to prepare!"

After the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor finished speaking, he left here.

......

Ye Tian did not continue to enter the Time True Pagoda to cultivate, but came to the True Disciple Trial Space of the Heavenly Ape Ruins.

He is also interested in the inheritance of true disciples, maybe not as good as the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, but not necessarily much worse.

The True Disciple Trial Space also tests the combat power, potential, and talent, etc., and also needs to defeat some powerful puppets.

For Ye Tian, it was not difficult at all to break through the trial space of the True Disciple Sect.

Not long after, Ye Tian came out of the True Transmission Disciple Trial Space, holding a True Transmission Disciple Order in his hand.

After receiving the order of the True Transmission Disciple, Ye Tian came to the True Transmission Palace.

The True Legend Hall is very large and relatively complete, occupying an area of nearly 100,000 li.

Moreover, the materials used to build the True Transmission Hall are also very extraordinary, and the value of this True Transmission Hall alone is unimaginable.

However, the True Transmission Hall and this ruin are all linked together in a large broken array, and unless the formation of the True Transmission Hall is broken, there is no way to remove the True Transmission Palace.

And destroying the Great Array is tantamount to destroying the True Transmission Palace, and it is difficult for the top major forces to do it, and even if they do, they will not do it.

Ye Tian took the True Transmission Disciple Order and easily entered the True Transmission Hall.

In the midst of a vast void.

Ye Tian appeared here, and immediately found huge bronze monuments, these monuments stood in the void everywhere, and they were the inheritance of disciples of the true sect.

"There are 123 inheritance monuments, and there are really a lot of inheritances of the Heavenly Ape Sect!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It stands to reason that the Heavenly Ape Sect with such a background should give birth to a Dao Ancestor, and it cannot be an ordinary force without a Dao Ancestor.

"According to the information, the Heavenly Ape Sect is one of the subordinate forces of the Holy Ape Sect, maybe after the Heavenly Ape Sect gives birth to a Dao Ancestor, it will immediately join the Holy Ape Sect, so from beginning to end, the Heavenly Ape Sect does not have a Dao Ancestor. It can even be said that the Heavenly Ape Sect is one of the branches of the Holy Ape Sect for cultivating Dao Ancestors! It's just that most of the disciples of the Heavenly Ape Sect don't know about this matter, and it is estimated that only the True Ancestor knows this secret!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It is precisely because of this that no matter how weak the Heavenly Ape Sect is, its inheritance is definitely above the top forces of Chaos, and even the Void Heaven Pulse is estimated to be inferior to the Heavenly Ape Sect in terms of inheritance.

"The True Ancestors have not yet come, once the True Ancestors come, the inheritance of the Heavenly Ape Sect may also cause a fight!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There are many inheritances of true disciples, and Ye Tian is also dazzled, and he doesn't know which inheritance to choose.

Whew!!!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, checking the inheritance information on the giant monuments.

Although he can't observe the true inheritance, he can see some simple inheritance information, which is also a setting made for the true inheritance disciples to choose the inheritance, otherwise the true transmission disciples don't know what the inheritance is, and they don't dare to choose randomly.

"The Giant Serpent Inheritance!"

"Wind Roar is a lineage inheritance!"

"Inheritance of the first line!"

"The Inheritance of the Desolate Beast!"

"Immortal Bird Inheritance!"

......

Ye Tian took a closer look at these inheritances and found that they were all related to some powerful lifeforms.

"The inheritance of the Heavenly Ape Sect should all imitate some ancient and powerful lifeforms, plus their own perfection, so as to form a cultivation method that belongs to the cultivator's lineage!" Ye Tian suddenly realized.

"I have cultivated the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, and this Chaos Alchemy Technique is estimated to be an imitation of a terrifying Golden Ape, I should choose a inheritance that is compatible with the life of the ape!"

Ye Tian followed this route to find and found a total of forty-two inheritances.

Because most of the inheritance of the Heavenly Ape Sect is related to apes, there are more inheritances about apes.

For example, the Yellow Ape Inheritance, the Iron Ape Inheritance, the King Kong Ape Inheritance, the Roaring Ape Inheritance, and the Hitomi Ape Inheritance......

Suddenly.

Ye Tian discovered a true inheritance called the Holy Ape Inheritance.

"Holy Ape, could it be that it has something to do with the Holy Ape Sect, if that's the case, I'm afraid that this Holy Ape Inheritance has extraordinary potential!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, Ye Tian chose this holy ape inheritance.

Walking into the Inheritance Monument, Ye Tian began to accept the inheritance information.

Rumble!!!!

Countless pieces of information poured into Ye Tian's mind.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai really accepted these inheritance information, and immediately felt that this inheritance was not simple, but it was not very complete, only half of the inheritance, and could only be cultivated to the extreme of the true ancestor, and there was no inheritance part above the Dao ancestor.

Ye Tian guessed that the latter half of the inheritance was estimated to be in the Holy Ape Sect, and it was estimated that there was no within the Heavenly Ape Sect!

Moreover, he guessed that the other lineages should also be like this, all of which lacked the later lineages.

Therefore, once the True Ancestors of the Heavenly Ape Sect are promoted to the True Ancestors, they must go to the Holy Ape Sect, otherwise without the subsequent inheritance, the growth rate will be much slower, and unless they change to other routes, it will be difficult to make great progress.

In addition, the cultivation system of the Heavenly Ape Sect has high requirements for inheritance, and it is difficult to progress without inheritance.

And Ye Tian's cultivation system in this chaotic region is relatively casual, but because of its randomness, the combat power of this chaotic region is not strong.

If it was compared to the same level, the cultivators of the domain realm would probably beat the cultivators of this chaotic region.

It's not speculation, it's something that is certain!

Of course.

Ye Tian will not take the route of the Holy Ape Inheritance, his path has already been decided, and he will only learn from the Holy Ape Inheritance.

The Holy Ape Inheritance includes many aspects, among which the core inheritance is a cultivation method that can directly cultivate to the extreme of the True Ancestor's Holy Ape Power, and the power of the Holy Ape is similar to the Chaos Divine Power.

With the power of the holy ape as the mainstay, combined with many body refining techniques to boil the body, it is enough to make one's own strength extremely powerful.

But once you have cultivated the power of the Holy Ape, it will be more difficult to change to other cultivation methods.

However, the Xuanxuan Technique that Ye Tian cultivated before was not so restrictive, and the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique only focused on refining the body, and did not require other aspects.

Strictly speaking, Ye Tian did not cultivate a powerful and restrictive cultivation method.

But when it comes to the True Ancestor level, it's different.

True Ancestors need to cultivate the power of True Ancestors, and they must cultivate a cultivation method, otherwise it will be difficult for True Ancestors to progress.

Although Ye Tian was not yet at that level, he had already thought about it, regarding his own cultivation method and the future, he would create his own cultivation method.

Originally, Ye Tian was worried that he was not rich enough, but the domain realm ruins gave him hope, as long as he found more inheritance, he would definitely be able to create a powerful method that suited him perfectly.

"I've harvested a heritage, yes, it's time to go back to cultivation!"

Ye Tian walked out of the giant monument and was moved out by the True Transmission Hall.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the Heavenly Ape Giant City.

A new round of practice continues!
